author: lOrm
content: Fixed: extension_to_language and known_languages consolidated into single LANGUAGES table in src/rules.rs. New test_languages_table_consistency enforces bidirectional consistency (every (lang, exts) entry round-trips through extension_to_language; names are lowercase/kebab-case; all entries have at least one extension). Refactor closes mandated points 1, 2, 4. Point 3 (compile-time assertion) addressed at test-time. Point 5 (rename to context_rules) is independent cosmetic — leaving for another pass.
